# Hasil Scraping Fitur Portal Mahasiswa Siakadmu

Berikut adalah hasil penelusuran menu dan halaman dari portal mahasiswa:

- **Login LMS** (Route: `https://lms.ummada.ac.id/beranda?&refferer=siakad`)
- **Login PMB** (Route: `https://stfmuhammadiyahcirebon.pmbonline.siakad.tech/oauth?&refferer=siakad`)
- **Dashboard** (Route: `/dashboard`)
- **Biodata** (Route: `/biodata`)
- **KRS** (Route: `/dashboard`)
- **KRSS** (Route: `/krss`)
- **KRS** (Route: `/krs`)
- **PKRS** (Route: `/pkrs`)
- **Biaya Kuliah** (Route: `/biaya-kuliah`)
- **Bahan & Tugas** (Route: `/bahan-dan-tugas`)
- **Jadwal & Presensi** (Route: `/jadwal-dan-presensi`)
- **PA Online** (Route: `/pa-online`)
- **Kuesioner** (Route: `/kuesioner`)
- **Nilai** (Route: `/nilai`)
- **Kegiatan** (Route: `/dashboard`)
- **Akademik** (Route: `/akademik`)
- **Seminar** (Route: `/seminar`)
- **Sertifikasi** (Route: `/sertifikasi`)
- **Pengajuan** (Route: `/dashboard`)
- **Cuti** (Route: `/cuti`)
- **Lock Jurnal** (Route: `/lock-jurnal`)
- **Proposal** (Route: `/proposal`)
- **Kompre** (Route: `/kompre`)
- **Wisuda** (Route: `/wisuda`)
- **Tugas Akhir** (Route: `/tugas-akhir`)
- **SKPI** (Route: `/skpi`)
- **Tracer Study** (Route: `/tracer-study`)
- **Panduan** (Route: `/panduan`)
